## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss content strategy, review progress, and align on priorities for Outreach's blog and content marketing efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/nscnZuzfMWCgkqt3TiMjp3UpxPsv_GMi?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content audit and refresh process underway; team to review and prioritize 33 articles for updates](https://fathom.video/share/nscnZuzfMWCgkqt3TiMjp3UpxPsv_GMi?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [New content strategy and topic clusters developed, aligning with Outreach's business objectives and buyer's journey](https://fathom.video/share/nscnZuzfMWCgkqt3TiMjp3UpxPsv_GMi?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
  - [Atlas AI content generation platform demonstrated, showcasing efficient content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/nscnZuzfMWCgkqt3TiMjp3UpxPsv_GMi?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
  - [Team open to new image creation approach for blog posts, balancing brand guidelines with fresh designs](https://fathom.video/share/nscnZuzfMWCgkqt3TiMjp3UpxPsv_GMi?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)

## Topics

### Content Audit and Refresh Process

  - [33 articles identified for potential refresh, prioritized by GrowthX and Outreach](https://fathom.video/share/nscnZuzfMWCgkqt3TiMjp3UpxPsv_GMi?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [Team to review priorities in Airtable, providing feedback on importance and relevance](https://fathom.video/share/nscnZuzfMWCgkqt3TiMjp3UpxPsv_GMi?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [Goal to scale production to 5 pieces per week, mixing new content and refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/nscnZuzfMWCgkqt3TiMjp3UpxPsv_GMi?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Two blog posts nearly ready for review, with changes marked in green for easy tracking](https://fathom.video/share/nscnZuzfMWCgkqt3TiMjp3UpxPsv_GMi?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)

### Content Strategy and Topic Clusters

  - [New strategy developed based on business objectives and content priorities](https://fathom.video/share/nscnZuzfMWCgkqt3TiMjp3UpxPsv_GMi?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
  - [Topic clusters identified, including software comparisons, revenue operations, and AI workflow automation](https://fathom.video/share/nscnZuzfMWCgkqt3TiMjp3UpxPsv_GMi?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
  - [Aligns with Outreach's internal plans for theme-based campaigns and buyer's journey mapping](https://fathom.video/share/nscnZuzfMWCgkqt3TiMjp3UpxPsv_GMi?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
  - [Team to review and provide feedback on proposed strategy and clusters](https://fathom.video/share/nscnZuzfMWCgkqt3TiMjp3UpxPsv_GMi?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)

### Atlas AI Content Generation Platform

  - [Demonstrated workflow for efficient content creation, from brief to publication](https://fathom.video/share/nscnZuzfMWCgkqt3TiMjp3UpxPsv_GMi?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
  - [Utilizes AI for research, outlining, and initial drafting while maintaining human oversight](https://fathom.video/share/nscnZuzfMWCgkqt3TiMjp3UpxPsv_GMi?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [Importance of accurate company context, personas, and writing guidelines emphasized](https://fathom.video/share/nscnZuzfMWCgkqt3TiMjp3UpxPsv_GMi?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
  - [Capability to produce up to 20 pieces per month in regular engagement](https://fathom.video/share/nscnZuzfMWCgkqt3TiMjp3UpxPsv_GMi?tab=summary&timestamp=1109.0)

### Content Requests and Prioritization

  - [Team can use Slack to request new content priorities or topics](https://fathom.video/share/nscnZuzfMWCgkqt3TiMjp3UpxPsv_GMi?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)
  - [Airtable to be expanded with more detailed assignment information in coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/nscnZuzfMWCgkqt3TiMjp3UpxPsv_GMi?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)
  - [Possibility of creating other content types (e.g., whitepapers) to be discussed as needed](https://fathom.video/share/nscnZuzfMWCgkqt3TiMjp3UpxPsv_GMi?tab=summary&timestamp=1309.0)

### Image Creation for Blog Posts

  - [Team open to new approach for blog post images](https://fathom.video/share/nscnZuzfMWCgkqt3TiMjp3UpxPsv_GMi?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)
  - [Will maintain text on images but explore fresh designs for cover images](https://fathom.video/share/nscnZuzfMWCgkqt3TiMjp3UpxPsv_GMi?tab=summary&timestamp=1750.0)
  - [GrowthX to present new image concepts aligning with Outreach's brand guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/nscnZuzfMWCgkqt3TiMjp3UpxPsv_GMi?tab=summary&timestamp=1750.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Outreach team to review and prioritize 33 articles for refresh in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/nscnZuzfMWCgkqt3TiMjp3UpxPsv_GMi?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [Jo to send two blog posts for review, along with discussed materials and documents](https://fathom.video/share/nscnZuzfMWCgkqt3TiMjp3UpxPsv_GMi?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [GrowthX to develop and present new image concepts for blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/nscnZuzfMWCgkqt3TiMjp3UpxPsv_GMi?tab=summary&timestamp=1750.0)
  - [Discuss CTA edition in next week's meeting with Ada](https://fathom.video/share/nscnZuzfMWCgkqt3TiMjp3UpxPsv_GMi?tab=summary&timestamp=1796.0)
  - [Continue scaling content production to 5 pieces per week](https://fathom.video/share/nscnZuzfMWCgkqt3TiMjp3UpxPsv_GMi?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
